app.title: Coin Collection
app.emptyState: Select a collection from the sidebar to view its coins.

collections.title: Collections
collections.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
collections.deleteWarning: This will also delete all coins and photos in this collection.

errors.tooShort: Collection name must be at least 2 characters
errors.tooLong: Collection name must be less than 100 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.currencyHint: New coins will use this currency by default. Each coin can have its own currency.

coins.title: Coins
coins.noCoins: No coins in this collection yet.
coins.noCoinsHint: Click "Add Coin" to start your collection.
coins.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this coin?
coins.llmExportTooltip: Paste this JSON into an AI chat and ask your questions — e.g. about current market prices, mintage, etc. See the prompt template below for an example. Important: the response must contain "id" and "info" fields only.
coins.llmImportTooltip: Copy the JSON response from the AI chat into a file, then import it here to add the information to your coins.

photos.title: Photos
photos.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?

import.title: Import from Spreadsheet
import.selectHint: Select an .xlsx file exported from Google Sheets.
import.previewHint: Review the data below before importing. You can edit collection names.
import.importing: Importing... This may take a while for large files.

backup.title: Actions with collections
backup.sectionBackupTooltip: ZIP file with a full copy of the database contents, including photos
backup.exportFormatsTooltip: Export selected collections with coin metadata to PDF or .xslx (for Excel/Apple Numbers)
backup.mergeWarning: Existing records will be updated with data from the backup. New records will be added. No data will be deleted.

exportPdf.title: Export to PDF
exportPdf.purchaseInfoNo: Without purchase info (denomination, year, country, condition, notes)
exportPdf.purchaseInfoYes: With purchase info (add price, date, place in gray text)
